info.description: PDF list on /investor-relations. Upload the PDF in each entry's File field.

title.description: Document name shown in the list, e.g. Prospectus (May 2026).

kind.description: Document category. Used for grouping and labelling.

file.description: The PDF file to link to. Upload here or pick from the Media Library.

effectiveDate.description: Date the document takes effect or was published (optional).

order.description: Display order in the list (lower numbers show first).
